a.xlink:title: The frame containing the menu and the sidebars.
This class generates a pane containing the table of contents.
This class generates a pane containing the last commands that were issued.
The configuration storage for the current worksheet.
The class that draws the status bar.
A menu bar that flickers less on MS windows.
The class for the sidebar with the draw commands.
The canvas that contains the spreadsheet the whole program is about.
The narrow view surface the worksheet's size pipeline needs.
Remembers the last virtual size applied, so an unchanged size is a no-op.
An implementation detail for the type-specific templated cell pointers.
This class generates a pane displaying the communication between maxima and wxMaxima.
A class that maintains a list of recent documents.
This class handles parsing the xml representation of a cell tree.
